summary: Tested 'Add Contact' UX unification. The '+' button on Contacts page now navigates to /contact/new instead of opening a modal. Home page 'Add Contact' tile also correctly navigates to /contact/new. The /contact/new page renders with all expected fields. No modal overlays or animation glitches were found - using clean full-page navigation.

issues: The data-testid='add-contact-btn' attribute is defined in code but not rendered in DOM due to React Native Web's TouchableOpacity not forwarding data-testid to the rendered element. The accessibilityLabel='Add new contact' IS properly rendered and accessible for testing.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: contacts.tsx line 185-187 - handleAddNewContact uses router.push('/contact/new')
VERIFIED: contacts.tsx line 437-444 - '+' button has data-testid='add-contact-btn' and accessibilityLabel='Add new contact'
VERIFIED: home.tsx line 603-604 - 'Add Contact' tile in TILES array uses router.push('/contact/new')
VERIFIED: contact/[id].tsx line 318 - isNewContact = id === 'new' correctly detects new contact mode
NOTE: Modal code and state variables (showAddContactModal, newContactFirstName, etc.) have been properly removed from contacts.tsx
MINOR: data-testid attribute is not rendered in DOM due to React Native Web behavior - use aria-label for testing instead
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add Contact UX is unified. Both the Contacts page '+' button and Home page 'Add Contact' tile navigate to /contact/new. The old modal has been completely removed. For automated testing, use aria-label='Add new contact' to find the add button as data-testid is not rendered in React Native Web.

contacts_plus_button_navigation.notes: No modal opens, direct navigation to /contact/new

contact_new_page_renders.test: /contact/new page renders correctly with all fields

home_add_contact_tile.test: Home page 'Add Contact' tile navigates to /contact/new

contacts_page_loads.test: Contacts page loads and displays contacts list

search_works.test: Contact search on contacts page works

no_animation_glitch.test: No animation glitch or jumping when navigating
no_animation_glitch.notes: Modal count: 0, No overlay elements found

cancel_button.test: Cancel button navigates back to contacts page

form_fields_fillable.test: Can fill in form fields on /contact/new page
